name: Sarah Mitchell
bio: Sarah has been a registered massage therapist for 8 years with a focus on oncology and post-surgical care. She graduated from the Mastectomy Guide certification program in 2021 and has since helped over 200 patients recover comfortably after breast surgery. Her gentle approach and deep understanding of scar tissue management make her a trusted provider in the Vancouver area.

name: Emily Chen
bio: Emily brings a unique blend of Western massage therapy and Traditional Chinese Medicine principles to her practice. As a Mastectomy Guide graduate, she specializes in supporting patients through their post-surgical recovery journey. Her downtown Toronto clinic provides a serene, welcoming environment focused on healing and restoration.

name: Rachel Dubois
bio: Rachel is a passionate advocate for post-surgical breast care. After completing her Mastectomy Guide certification in 2022, she established a dedicated practice in Calgary focused exclusively on mastectomy recovery. Her clients appreciate her thorough approach and commitment to ongoing education in the latest scar tissue and lymphatic techniques.

name: Maria Santos
bio: Maria combines her extensive training in lymphatic drainage with her Mastectomy Guide certification to offer comprehensive post-surgical care. Based in Ottawa, she works closely with local surgeons and oncologists to provide integrated recovery plans. Her bilingual practice serves both English and French-speaking clients.

name: Catherine Tremblay
bio: Catherine is one of Quebec's leading specialists in post-mastectomy massage therapy. With over a decade of experience and her Mastectomy Guide certification, she provides expert care in her Montreal clinic. She is known for her compassionate approach and her commitment to helping patients regain confidence and comfort after surgery.

name: Anna Kowalski
bio: Anna has been a dedicated massage therapist in Winnipeg for 6 years. Her Mastectomy Guide certification has allowed her to fill a critical gap in post-surgical care in the Prairie region. Patients travel from across Manitoba to benefit from her specialized techniques in breast surgery recovery and lymphatic management.

name: Jennifer MacDonald
bio: Jennifer is a Halifax-based therapist who brings warmth and expertise to every patient interaction. As a Mastectomy Guide certified practitioner, she offers the full spectrum of post-surgical breast care services. Her waterfront clinic provides a calming atmosphere where patients can focus on their recovery journey.

name: Lisa Thompson
bio: Lisa operates her practice in beautiful Victoria, BC, where she combines her Mastectomy Guide training with a holistic approach to recovery. She specializes in scar tissue therapy and has developed innovative techniques for improving mobility and reducing discomfort after breast surgery. Her clients value her attention to detail and genuine care.

name: Jessica Williams
bio: Jessica is a licensed massage therapist based in Seattle who completed her Mastectomy Guide certification to better serve her oncology patients. With a background in clinical massage, she brings evidence-based techniques to her post-surgical practice. Her central Seattle location makes her accessible to patients throughout the Pacific Northwest.

name: Sophie Clarke
bio: Sophie is a leading post-mastectomy massage therapist in London, UK. After discovering The Mastectomy Guide program, she traveled to Canada for certification and now brings these specialized techniques to British patients. Her Harley Street practice serves clients from across the UK and Europe, offering world-class post-surgical breast care.

name: Rebecca Taylor
bio: Rebecca runs a thriving practice in Manchester dedicated to oncology and post-surgical massage. Her Mastectomy Guide certification has been transformative for her practice, allowing her to offer specialized care that was previously unavailable in the region. She regularly speaks at healthcare conferences about the importance of post-mastectomy bodywork.

name: Amanda Johnson
bio: Amanda is a New York City-based licensed massage therapist with advanced certification from The Mastectomy Guide. With over 12 years of clinical experience, she offers the most comprehensive post-surgical breast care services in the NYC area. Her Manhattan clinic is conveniently located and designed with patient comfort and privacy in mind.
